name: MurkPyRSS
author: Rodrigo Mescua
description: MurkPyRSS is a powerful RSS feed generator that combines modern scraping with custom CSS selectors and a visual sandbox. It allows you to generate RSS feeds for websites that don't provide them natively.

form_fields.label: FlareSolverr URL
form_fields.hint: URL of your FlareSolverr instance (e.g., http://flaresolverr:8191)
